title: Master Localized Font Loading & Glyph Management
description: Architect font-loading strategies to prevent Flash of Invisible Text (FOIT) and Flash of Unstyled Text (FOUT) for non-Latin scripts. Manage the dynamic injection of language-specific web fonts effectively.
objectives: Architect font-loading strategies to prevent Flash of Invisible Text (FOIT) and Flash of Unstyled Text (FOUT) for non-Latin scripts.
Manage the dynamic injection of language-specific web fonts effectively.
